important: Make sure links you're sending customers are for THE HAPPY PLANNER!
Example of what NOT to send: thehappinessplanner.com (The Happiness Planner is completely different company)
tone: Use a more upbeat, but professional tone
promo_and_exclusions: 🅿️ Promote customers to sign up to Happy Rewards, use RWD shortcut
DON'T ask customers to check their email if they didn't get the code for signing up for emails & texts OR for spinning the wheel! The code should be in the texts!
Custom Planners are excluded from discount codes
old_expired_codes: Please do not send old or expired codes to subscribers. This includes recycling old codes that may have previously gone to the sub and is no longer valid.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for legal and fraud related inquires
Send to CS for product safety inquires and threats
Send to CS for website technical issues
escalate: ESC if cx claims bodily injury as result of a product
ESC if cx highlights dangers to health/safety as a result of product
templates: For all post-purchase & warranty inquiries use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For discount code issues use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For product info that you can't find on the site use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
If cx reach out about 90 qt cooler recall, use shortcut RCC
For custom order cancellation and edit requests, don't use CED, use the designated templates instead
